inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront capital expenditure required for the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront capital expenditure required for the investment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırım için gereken toplam peşin sermaye harcaması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte anfängliche Investitionsausgabe für die Investition.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses d'investissement initial totales requises pour l'investissement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desembolso total de capital inicial requerido para la inversión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الإنفاق الرأسمالي المطلوب مقدمًا للاستثمار.

inputs.label: Annual Net Cash Flow
inputs.businessContext: Net cash inflow generated annually after all operational costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net cash inflow generated annually after all operational costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm işletme maliyetleri sonrası yıllık net nakit girişi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Netto-Cashzufluss, der jährlich nach allen Betriebskosten generiert wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Flux de trésorerie net généré annuellement après tous les coûts opérationnels.
businessContext_i18n.es: Entrada neta de efectivo generada anualmente después de todos los costos operativos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: صافي التدفق النقدي الناتج سنويًا بعد جميع التكاليف التشغيلية.

inputs.label: Annual Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual percentage increase in net cash flow. Enter 0 for constant flows.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual percentage increase in net cash flow. Enter 0 for constant flows.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Net nakit akışındaki yıllık yüzde artış. Sabit akışlar için 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher prozentualer Anstieg des Netto-Cashflows. Bei konstanten Flüssen 0 eingeben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Augmentation annuelle en pourcentage du flux de trésorerie net. Entrez 0 pour des flux constants.
businessContext_i18n.es: Aumento porcentual anual del flujo de caja neto. Ingrese 0 para flujos constantes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية للزيادة السنوية في صافي التدفق النقدي. أدخل 0 للتدفقات الثابتة.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Expected residual value of the asset at end of life; not directly used in simple payback.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected residual value of the asset at end of life; not directly used in simple payback.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın ömrü sonunda beklenen kalıntı değeri; basit geri ödemede doğrudan kullanılmaz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Restwert des Vermögenswerts am Ende der Nutzungsdauer; wird bei einfachem Payback nicht direkt verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur résiduelle attendue de l'actif en fin de vie ; non utilisée directement dans le calcul du délai de récupération simple.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor residual esperado del activo al final de su vida útil; no se utiliza directamente en el cálculo del período de recuperación simple.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة المتبقية المتوقعة للأصل في نهاية العمر؛ لا تُستخدم مباشرة في فترة الاسترداد البسيطة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
